name: PCB BANCORP
business: PCB Bancorp is a bank holding company that provides a broad range of loans, deposits, and other products and services predominantly to small and middle market businesses and individuals.

exposures.sentence: Residential mortgage loans are typically collateralized by primary residential properties located in the Company s market areas to enable borrowers to purchase or refinance existing homes.
